title: Constant function evaluator incorrect on return of function var

features.name: function returning unpacked array typedef
features.description: Code should include a function declared to return an unpacked array type defined via typedef

features.name: constant evaluation of function returning unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a localparam assigned from a function call that returns an unpacked array type

features.name: array indexing of function return value in constant expression
features.description: Code should include indexing into a function return value (foo()[index]) used in a constant expression context
features.snippet:
localparam bit [31:0] x = foo()[1];
localparam bit [31:0] y = foo()[i+1];

features.name: slice using indexed function return value
features.description: Code should include a bit slice operation using indexed function return values for the range bounds
